MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-04-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITIBANK. CITIBANK HAS NO CONTINUING INTEREST IN EITHER THE DEED OF TRUST, WHICH HAS BEEN RECONVEYED, ITS VALIDITY OR THE PROPERTY TO WHICH IT ONCE ATTACHED. CITIBANK CAN AFFORD NO RELIEF TO PLAINTIFF AND THE COURT CAN DO NOTHING MORE THAN DECLARE CITIBANK'S NO LONGER EXTANT CLAIMS VOID. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Daniel Dezhan Li, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Shu-Long Lee.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) George Chen, aka Chia Chih Chen.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:
Judgment for Plaintiff SHU-LONG-LEE, aka SHU-LONG LEE CHEN, LEE SHU LONG CHEN and against defendant GOERGE CHENA, aka CHIA CHIH CHEN.
The Grant Deed executed on April 23, 2003, and recorded as Instrument No. 2003-H433348-00 on Thursday, May 8, 2003, in Reel I383, Image0743, of Official Records, in the office of San Francisco Assessor-Recorder is declared VOID. A copy of the void Grant Deed is attached as Echibit A.
2. Defendant George Chen, aka Chia Chih Chen shall forthwith deliver the original copy of void Grant Deed to the clerk of this Court for cancellation, and the clerk shall cancel it and deilver it promptyly to plaintiff.
3. Defendant George Chen, aka Chia Chih Chen shall pay plailntiff Shu-Long Lee, aka, Shu-long Lee Chen, Lee shu Long Chen on the Second Amended Complaint:
Damages $5,000.00
Costs $500.00
Total $5,511.75

Judgment signed in open court.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL LI, TEL. NO. (408) 844-8984 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. BRIAN H. GUNN OF THE WOLFE & WYMAN LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 280-0004 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CITIBANK.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITIBANK. CITIBANK HAS NO CONTINUING INTEREST IN EITHER THE DEED OF TRUST, WHICH HAS BEEN RECONVEYED, ITS VALIDITY OR THE PROPERTY TO WHICH IT ONCE ATTACHED. CITIBANK CAN AFFORD NO RELIEF TO PLAINTIFF AND THE COURT CAN DO NOTHING MORE THAN DECLARE CITIBANK'S NO LONGER EXTANT CLAIMS VOID. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
